---
title: "Hi, I'm Tyler"
image: "Tyler.jpg"
links:
  - label: Data Blog
    url: "https://tylerjtran.github.io/data_blog/"
  - label: Spatial Join Tool
    url: "./spatialjoin"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/tylerjtran"
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/tylerjtran/"
  - label: Email
    url: "mailto:tylerjtran@gmail.com"
output:
  postcards::jolla:
    includes:
      in_header: gtm_head.html
      before_body: gtm_body.html
---
 
I like using data to effect positive change. I specialize in creating data products that make information more open and accessible, helping people and businesses make clearer decisions. Click any of the links below to learn more about me.
